_legend.About: Microsoft 365 / Azure administrator set. Everything ships as Mode=Ignore - flip what you use to Load or InstallOnly.

Modules.Name: Microsoft.Graph.Authentication
Modules.Description: Connect-MgGraph; shared by the v1.0 and beta Graph SDK

Modules.Name: Microsoft.Entra
Modules.Description: Identity-focused, friendlier layer over the Graph SDK

Modules.Name: PnP.PowerShell
Modules.Description: Power tools for SharePoint Online / Microsoft 365

Modules.Name: Az.Accounts
Modules.Description: Connect-AzAccount; base for all Az.* modules - lighter than installing the full Az meta-module

Modules.Name: Microsoft.PowerShell.SecretManagement
Modules.Description: Unified API for storing/retrieving secrets across vaults
